## Fixes

- **Auto-update now restarts on its own** — clicking "Update & restart" previously downloaded the new version but didn't relaunch; it now installs and restarts into the new build automatically. (Updating *to* this version may still need one manual reopen, since the old code runs the update — from here on it's automatic.)
- **Current version** is now shown in Settings → Basic → Software updates.

## macOS — how to open

This build is **ad-hoc signed** (not yet notarized with an Apple Developer ID). If installing manually, on first open macOS shows a security prompt:

- **Right-click (or Control-click) the app → Open → Open**, or
- **System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway** (after the first blocked attempt).

If a download still shows "damaged", clear the quarantine once:

```
xattr -cr /Applications/Parley.app
```

(In-app updates download in the background and shouldn't trip this prompt.)
